step_rationale: Forms oxLDL complexes; antiphospholipid antibody target in thrombotic syndrome.
mechanism: Beta-2-glycoprotein I complexes with oxidized LDL in atherosclerotic lesions and is targeted by antiphospholipid antibodies to activate thrombosis.

references.title: Clinical and laboratory features of the catastrophic antiphospholipid syndrome.
Oxidation of LDL and its clinical implication.
Atherogenesis and the humoral immune response to modified lipoproteins.
Oxidized LDL/beta2-glycoprotein I complexes: new aspects in atherosclerosis.
